title: Rampara Kalibari
tagline: Rampara Kalibari — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: The Rampara Kalibari is a Hindu temple located in Rampara near Kolkata, just 35 km away from Kolkata.
overview.description: The Rampara Kalibari is a Hindu temple located in Rampara near Kolkata, just 35 km away from Kolkata. The presiding deity of the temple is Siddheshwari Kali, an aspect of Kali, Siddheshwar is the name of Lord Shiva, Siddheshwari is the feminine form of that. The temple was built by Nandy family of Rampara, great devotees of Goddess Kali. The temple is famous for its Kali pooja which is held on October/November during Diwali.

topPlaces.name: Furfura Fatehia Senior Madrasah
topPlaces.description: Furfura Fatehia Senior Madrasah is a madrasah in Furfura Sharif, Hooghly district, West Bengal, India. It was founded in 1903 by the inaugural Pir of Furfura, Mohammad Abu Bakr Siddique.

topPlaces.name: Furfura Sharif
topPlaces.description: Furfura is a village in Jangipara community development block of Srirampore subdivision in Hooghly District in the state of West Bengal, India. It is a holy place for some Bengali Muslims.

items.note: Furfura Fatehia Senior Madrasah is a madrasah in Furfura Sharif, Hooghly district, West Bengal, India. It was founded in 1903 by the inaugural Pir of Furfura, Mohammad Abu Bakr Siddique.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rampara Kalibari?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rampara Kalibari is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rampara Kalibari?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rampara Kalibari?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rampara Kalibari at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rampara Kalibari?
faq.a: Stays in Rampara Kalibari start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rampara Kalibari?
faq.a: The top attractions are Furfura Fatehia Senior Madrasah, Furfura Sharif, Shyamsundarpur, Chanditala-I, Kalyanbati, Aniya.
